features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
Progressively nourishes, leaving hair healthier in the long run
Nourishes to make hair softer and 5x smoother
Moisturising shampoo that nourishes to make hair softer and up to 5x smoother* Helps to protect normal hair from daily wear and tear Leaves your hair feeling silky and manageable every day
description: Ingredients Aqua, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Sodium Gluconate, Glycerin, Dimethiconol, Parfum, Lysine HCl, Arginine, Cocos Nucifera Oil, Hydrolyzed SOY Protein, Sodium Chloride, Glycol Distearate, Citric Acid, Sodium Benzoate, Carbomer, Guar Hydroxypropyltrimonium Chloride, TEA-Dodecylbenzenesulfonate, TEA-Sulfate, Disodium EDTA, Mica, Cocamide MEA, PEG-45M, Phenoxyethanol, PPG-6, Sodium Hydroxide, Benzyl Alcohol, Citronellol, Hexyl Cinnamal, Limonene, Linalool, CI 15985, CI 19140, CI 77891 Directions Simply apply this Dove shampoo to wet hair and gently massage into a lather. Its lightweight formula rinses out easily, so it won’t leave your hair feeling heavy or weighed down. Suitable for daily use. Safety Warning Caution: use only as directed. Avoid contact with eyes. If eye contact occurs wash out immediately with warm water. If irritation occurs discontinue use. As we are always looking to improve our products, our formulations change from time to time, so please always check the product packaging before useavoid contact with eyes. In case of contact with eyes, rinse thoroughly with water. See more
